page_content:
Formerly: EDCP789N.

EDCP770 Service-Learning and College Student Development (3 Credits) Historical roots, concepts, and principles of practice of service-learning in higher education; includes community service component.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP770 or EDCP789V.

Formerly: EDCP789Y.

EDCP772 Research in Student Affairs (3 Credits)

Research designs and approaches to research in student development and higher education. Development of research for research competency or dissertation proposal.
